CVE-2021-33896.title: Dino before 0.1.2 and 0.2.x before 0.2.1 allows Directory Travers ...
CVE-2021-33896.description: Dino before 0.1.2 and 0.2.x before 0.2.1 allows Directory Traversal (only for creation of new files) via URI-encoded path separators.

CVE-2023-28686.title: Dino before 0.2.3, 0.3.x before 0.3.2, and 0.4.x before 0.4.2 all ...
CVE-2023-28686.description: Dino before 0.2.3, 0.3.x before 0.3.2, and 0.4.x before 0.4.2 allows attackers to modify the personal bookmark store via a crafted message. The attacker can change the display of group chats or force a victim to join a group chat; the victim may then be tricked into disclosing sensitive information.
